name: S.D. Standard ETC
longBusinessSummary: S.D. Standard ETC Plc, an investment holding company, focuses on energy, transport, and commodities segments. The company was formerly known as S.D. Standard Drilling Plc and changed its name to S.D. Standard ETC Plc in February 2022. S.D. Standard ETC Plc was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Limassol, Cyprus.
